title: Peacock Alley
writer: Ouida Bergère, Edmund Goulding, Fanny Hatton
actors: Mae Murray, Monte Blue, Edmund Lowe
plot: Elmer Harmon goes to Paris to sign a contract with the French government, he meets dancer Cleo, with whom he falls in love and she is instrumental in acquiring the contract for him. They are married, and Elmer takes his bride back...
